text.title: python Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure to scaffold a Python 3.11+ project end-to-end.

step.name: pin-python-and-poetry
step.decision-gate: If Poetry not acceptable, switch to uv but keep lock semantics.

step.name: ruff-and-mypy
step.action: Add `[tool.ruff]` + `[tool.mypy]` blocks; remove black/isort/flake8 if present.
step.decision-gate: If too many mypy errors at strict, scope to services/ first; ratchet weekly.

step.name: services-layer
step.action: Create services.py inside each Django app (or services/ package for FastAPI). Move logic from views/routes into services.
step.output: services.py per app; views/routes shrink to bind-validate-call-translate.
step.decision-gate: If a view shrinks below 10 lines, that's the target shape.

step.name: pytest-fixtures
step.action: Add pytest with parametrize + asyncio_mode = "auto"; create test fixtures (db_session, client).
step.output: tests/ with at least one services-level test.
step.decision-gate: If services-level tests are slow, see [[integration-testing]] for tx rollback.

step.name: asyncio-correctness
step.action: Replace sequential awaits with asyncio.gather() or TaskGroup; document why each parallel call is safe (no shared state).
step.decision-gate: If calls share state, keep sequential; if calls hit shared rate-limit, add a semaphore.

step.name: ci-gate
step.decision-gate: Block merge on any of the four checks.
